edges.label: drives
edges.why: Disruption at the main Gulf chokepoint increases risk of supply shortfall and raises freight/insurance costs.

edges.label: amplifies
edges.why: Energy shock increases inflation uncertainty and downside growth risk, prompting defensive positioning.

edges.label: contributes_to
edges.why: Sanctions and compliance risk can widen spreads for shipping/energy logistics and tighten financing conditions.

edges.label: triggers
edges.why: Direct state-on-state strikes raise tail-risk and increase demand for safe havens.

edges.label: partially_mitigates
edges.why: Rerouting may relieve some constraints but capacity limits and added route risks keep upside risk elevated.
